name: Mcmillan Shakespeare Limited
analysis: MMS's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 1% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$19.5400. Trade idea: entry A$19.5500, stop A$17.9685, target A$24.2945 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
